expectations.text: The report explicitly addresses misleading information and non-working links as Creem rejection causes.
expectations.evidence: Executive conclusion names broken links and unsupported social-proof claims as major risks.

expectations.text: The report checks testimonials, Product Hunt/as-seen badges, and unverifiable user-count or social-proof claims.
expectations.evidence: Checklist covers Testimonials, Product Hunt badge, and 10,000+/thousands user-count claims.

expectations.text: The report checks Twitter, Discord, GitHub, footer links, and community/navigation links with evidence.
expectations.evidence: Blockers cover Twitter/Discord href '#', Footer GitHub status, and /community missing route.

expectations.text: The report checks multi-language product-description consistency.
expectations.evidence: Includes a multi-language consistency table for 11 locales.

expectations.text: The report includes a professional Creem re-review reply draft.
expectations.evidence: Lines 65-82 include a re-review reply draft.

uncertainties: Task tool did not expose token/duration metrics.
